subsection.heading: Opportunity for Hearing.—
subsection.content: The Federal Maritime Commission shall provide an opportunity for a hearing before issuing an order relating to a violation of this part or a regulation prescribed under this part.

subsection.heading: Modification of Order.—
subsection.content: The Commission may reverse, suspend, or modify any of its orders.

subsection.heading: Rehearing.—
subsection.content: On application of a party to a proceeding, the Commission may grant a rehearing of the same or any matter determined in the proceeding. Except by order of the Commission, a rehearing does not operate as a stay of an order.

subsection.heading: Period of Effectiveness.—
subsection.content: An order of the Commission remains in effect for the period specified in the order or until suspended, modified, or set aside by the Commission or a court of competent jurisdiction.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:th.style: min-width: 44.0pt; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; border-right:1px solid black;

note.p: In subsection (a), the words “upon sworn complaint or on its own motion” are omitted as unnecessary.
